items.description: A bucket hat with small, scattered dark patterns, possibly depicting abstract shapes or tiny animals.
A short-sleeved t-shirt with a crew neck, smooth texture, and a relaxed fit.
A decorative scarf or wrap tied around the waist, featuring an artistic illustration of a bird or abstract design on a light background, with a teal or gray border.
Wide-leg denim jeans with a relaxed fit, featuring a distressed or washed texture and a ruffled hem detail at the ankle.
Flat sandals with a cork footbed, two white straps adorned with floral cut-out details, and a dark sole.
A small, metallic silver shoulder bag with a short strap, featuring a slightly pleated or gathered texture.
A digital wristwatch with a rectangular face and a metal link band.
A beaded bracelet made of small, dark, possibly obsidian or onyx beads.
